_seeded_in: search-terms v4.7; calibration update v4.8; v5.1 regen (2026-05-06); cycle-14 hash-update 2026-05-08; v5.6 regen (2026-05-08, scheduled task); v5.7 regen (2026-05-15, scheduled task bg-search-terms-update); v5.8 regen (2026-05-19, scheduled task bg-search-terms-update)
_purpose: Persistent cycle memory — tracks per-query-category hit rates, per-team coverage, empty cells flagged by the negative-space audit, and queries marked for auto-deprecation or auto-promotion. Read at the start of every cycle to prioritise underexplored areas.

Studio._note: Was 27 before 2026-04-29 cull; -3 (Wealth.com, Savvy Wealth, Vise — Series B/C reference architectures, removed)

Research._note: Was 21 before 2026-04-29 cull; -5 (Wealth.com / Savvy Wealth / Nayya / Willow Wealth stage-mismatch + Versus / Noise / Octen adjacency-mismatch). v4.8 stage and adjacency gates now applied pre-scoring.

multi_team._note: autonomous, mantic, astor, era — all dual-tagged Studio+Research. Sooth Labs retained as multi-team.

_calibration_2026_04_29.summary: Sweep added 16 cards; 8 culled as misfits. Pipeline 106 → 98.
_calibration_2026_04_29.lesson: Stage filter is HARD pre-scoring, no 'reference architecture' exception. Adjacency gate requires primary financial-services fit. Encoded in search-terms v4.8 Operating Instructions.

consumer_behaviour_health_wealth_mental._note: Only Nayya. Need a second card; vocabulary in v4.4 Research Team block.

alt_data_for_life_events._note: Zero cards. Vocabulary exists in v4.4 but no hits yet — re-run with quarterly time-window slicing and investor-portfolio walks.

frontier_research_vendors_regulated._note: Zero cards. Mistral / Anthropic ecosystem partners are mentioned in thesis as Studio's collaborators but no startup vendors carded yet.

tokenization_fractionalization._note: Only TYTL. Need a second card — likely in private-equity or music-IP or art tokenization adjacency.

greens_specialist_blind_spots._note: From thesis Challenge Signal #7 (Specialist Agent Desert) — these specialist-agent categories remain at 0 or 1 pipeline companies

next_cycle_targets: S3/S5/S6 desert: consider reverse-archetype queries using APEX Standard + Broadridge ecosystem to find conformant implementation startups
APEX Standard: watch for commercial entities emerging from the protocol — GitHub org contributors or broker integration announcements
S9 (Behavioural Coaching): try academic spin-out queries (UCL, LSE behavioural finance labs) + Product Hunt
S10 (Post-Trade Analysis): try "transaction cost analysis AI" or "TCA AI" queries — different vocabulary than used before
CEE/Baltic: try Polish (mamstartup.pl) and Estonian (arcticstartup.com) in native query formats; switch to search in Polish for mamstartup
Italy second sweep: A-Cube opened the Italian track — try economyup.it and startupbusiness.it for more
L4a Accelerators: due for run (skipped last 2 cycles)
L4b Seed VCs: due for run (skipped last 2 cycles)
L2 Product launches: Product Hunt + Show HN — skipped this cycle
high_yield_queries: GitHub: financial agent execution broker protocol (L3)
Avantos/Astrada type: wealthmanagement.com AI fintech startup (L4e)

infrastructure_notes.preference_model_status: Live as of 2026-04-29. Re-engagement scheduled for cycle 10 — process votes since 2026-04-15 and refresh Hard Filter list.
infrastructure_notes.supabase_status: Archived 2026-04-29. All 62 prior votes migrated. Historical changelog entries reference Supabase as accurate at-the-time records.
